text: Terraform by HashiCorp is the dominant Infrastructure as Code tool, using HCL to declaratively define and provision cloud resources across 3000+ providers

Terraform by HashiCorp is the dominant Infrastructure as Code tool, using HCL (HashiCorp Configuration Language) to declaratively define and provision cloud resources across 3000+ providers. State file tracks real-world resources; plan shows pending changes.
Remote state (S3 + DynamoDB) for team collaboration and state locking.
Terraform Cloud/Enterprise adds VCS integration, policy as code (Sentinel), and cost estimation.
